title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing high-confidence forecasts days ahead of the Category 5 landfall in Jamaica. The model enabled the National Hurricane Center and local authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings.
